channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Genshin Impact Version Luna VI update ‘Song of the Welkin Moon: Rondo – Augured Homecoming’ launches April 8
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Smartphone
  • Xbox Series

Explore the skies and land of northern Mondstadt.

The Version Luna VI update for Genshin Impact, dubbed “Song of the Welkin Moon: Rondo – Augured Homecoming,” will launch on April 8, developer miHoYo announced.

Here is an overview of the update, via miHoYo:

This release introduces players to the vast northern reaches of Mondstadt, featuring new terrestrial areas and the Temple of Space high in the clouds for exploration. Linnea, a fae and naturalist from Snezhnaya, will also join the playable roster in this version. This 5-star Geo Bow wielder is set to bring more tactical depth to the Lunar-Crystallize reaction.

Mondstadt expands further north in Version Luna VI, where lush flower fields give way to the bustling trade at Dornman Port. Hovering high above this land is the mysterious Temple of Space, which houses fragments created by Asmoday, the sovereign of sky and space. Within this temple lie distinct realms inspired by ancient Liyue, Sumeru, and a fusion of various civilizations. Players can use a special interaction mechanic to manipulate and alter the space within these realms to uncover sealed paths and even secrets. By unraveling the mysteries of the Temple of Space, players will have the opportunity to revisit past adventures and gradually learn more about the enigmatic Ruler of Space. Additionally, players can also expect to encounter a new Boss, Watcher: Fallen Vigil, in the wilderness of the Dornman Port area.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Version Luna VI also marks the debut of the 5-star Geo Bow character Linnea, a naturalist and advisor to the Adventurers’ Guild. In combat, Linnea provides robust support to Lunar-Crystallize parties with her ability to convert Hydro-Crystallize reactions into Lunar-Crystallize reactions. By summoning her companion Lumi, Linnea can also increase Lunar-Crystallize DMG dealt while lowering the opponent’s Geo RES. Further, with her Elemental Skill Linnea can deal either continuous off-field Geo DMG or a massive Lunar-Crystallize reaction hit, and also provide partywide healing with her Elemental Burst. In open-world adventure, discoveries of new rare animals and other findings from nature will earn Linnea badges for her backpack.

During Version Luna VI, Linnea makes her debut alongside the returning Chasca in the first phase of the Event Wishes, while players will get another stab at obtaining Nefer and Lauma in the second phase. A Chronicled Wish featuring Fontaine characters will also be held for the first time.

Back in Nod-Krai, the Traveler has been invited to a trade show hosted by the Voynich Guild, where they will try to resolve conflicts sparked by some high-profile merchants while exploring the various activities associated with the trade show. With the help of cutting-edge inventions from all over Teyvat, players can coordinate aerial bombardments in a cooperative challenge, or test their reflexes in a fast-paced, color-coded barrage shooter. Completing these challenges gives players the chance to recruit Jahoda for free.

Meanwhile, Miliastra Wonderland receives a quality-of-life update which increases the capacity of the player lobby. This update also introduces a new special effect editor, as well as enhances skill customization and UI assets, thus further refining the overall gameplay and editing experience for our Craftspeople.

Genshin Impact is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, PC via client and Epic Games Store, iOS via the App Store, and Android via Google Play.

Watch a new set of trailers below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Version “Luna VI” Legendary Set Teaser

English

Japanese

Version Luna VI Update: “Song of the Welkin Moon: Rondo – Augured Homecoming” Special Program

English

Japanese

Korean



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/genshin-impact-version-luna-vi-update-song-of-the-welkin-moon-rondo-augured-homecoming-launches-april-8
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: The First Berserker: Khazan celebrates first anniversary with player stats and message from creative director
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

"We're working hard to bring you even more to enjoy."

Publisher Nexon and developer Neople have released a year’s worth of player stats and a message from the creative director in celebration of action RPG The First Berserker: Khazan‘s first anniversary today, promising more content to come.

“Now, more than ever, we’re driven by a single heartfelt desire—to create something even better, something even more fun for all of you to enjoy,” said creative director Junho Lee in the message. “Someday we’ll take on new challenges, but Khazan’s story is far from over. We’re working hard to bring you even more to enjoy—it’s the least we can do for a community that has given us so much. We’re pouring ourselves into it with genuine excitement, truly hoping from the bottom of our hearts that you’ll love what’s to come.”

Here are the full stats and message from Lee:

Stats

  • Journey’s End: How Player’s Completed Khazan’s Story
    • 35 percent – Normal: The first step on the path to vengeance
    • 40 percent – The First Berserker: Discovered the truth
    • 25 percent – Chain: Deeper into darkness, chains of fate unbound
  • Most Fatal Boss Encounters: Arad’s Deadliest Bosses
    • Expert Difficulty: Employee of the year, you’re not clocking out alive
      1. Viper (17,734,694 deaths)
      2. Volbano (16,140,829 deaths)
      3. Maluca (12,065,681 deaths)
    • Hardcore Difficulty: Only the bravest entered Hardcore difficulty, Maluca got the promotion
      1. Maluca (206,169 deaths)
      2. Ozma (154,202 deaths)
      3. Elamein (151,835 deaths)
  • Khazan Has Fallen: Total Deaths Across All Berserkers Worldwide
    • Total Deaths: 273,804,045
    • Other Causes of Death: Death came with a vengeance, and not always from a boss
      • Falling: 20,616,318
      • Status Effect: 5,558,618
      • Traps: 2,287,317
    • Deadliest Mobs: They don’t get a boss intro, but they earned one
      1. Prince Spider
      2. Lunatic Destroyer
      3. Wild Bear
  • Weapons of the Berserker: Khazan Has Three Types of Weapons… or Maybe Four?
    • Most Popular Weapon Types
      1. Spear: 38 percent
      2. Dual Wield: 37 percent
      3. Greatsword: 25 percent
    • Most Used Weapons
      1. Bloodthirsty Fiend’s Dual Wield
      2. Sentinel’s Greatsword
      3. Survivor’s Spear
    • No Hands
      • 43 bosses caught these hands: Some Berserkers chose to rely on no weapons at all, beating bosses with their fists… does that count as a fourthweapon type?
  • Geared for War: The Armor Berserkers Trusted Most in Battle
    • Most Trusted Armor
      1. Bloodthirsty Fiend
      2. Crimson Fiend
      3. Golden
    • Most Popular Phantom
      1. Kenta the Unyielding (23,355,981)
      2. Wulfric the Resilient (6,951,297)
    • Most Allocated Stat
      • Endurance (37,442,742)
  • Fastest Hardcore Difficulty Clear Time
    • Two hours and 10 minutes
      • 16 bosses in two hours and 10 minutes—shorter than many movies
  • Top Three Fastest Boss Clear Times on Hardcore Difficulty
    1. Reese (17 seconds)
    2. Aratra (13 seconds)
    3. Shactuka (16 seconds)

Message from Creative Director Junho Lee

Hello Berserkers,

This is Junho Lee, creative director of The First Berserker: Khazan.

First of all, I would like to sincerely thank you for loving The First Berserker: Khazan. Around this time last year, I remember thinking, “Once the spring flowers bloom, Khazan will finally be out in the world.”

That feels like just yesterday and yet, here we are, a full year after launch, already welcoming another spring. It’s hard to believe how quickly this past year has gone by. I poured my heart into making Khazan, telling myself that this would be the game I stake my entire career on, leaving absolutely nothing in the tank.

By the time we launched in 2025, I truly believed I had given every last ounce of energy I had. But then, so many of you showed up. You played the game, you shared your honest thoughts, and you cheered us on.

Because of all of that, not just me but the entire dev team found ourselves filled with even more energy than we spent building the game in the first place.

Now, more than ever, we’re driven by a single heartfelt desire—to create something even better, something even more fun for all of you to enjoy.

Someday we’ll take on new challenges, but Khazan’s story is far from over.

We’re working hard to bring you even more to enjoy—it’s the least we can do for a community that has given us so much. We’re pouring ourselves into it with genuine excitement, truly hoping from the bottom of our hearts that you’ll love what’s to come.

Thank you, sincerely, for playing The First Berserker: Khazan.

Being able to celebrate Khazan‘s first anniversary together with all of you means more than I can put into words. We’ll keep giving our very best to live up to your passion and support.

As always, thank you for being with us on this journey.

With gratitude,
Junho Lee



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/the-first-berserker-khazan-celebrates-first-anniversary-with-player-stats-and-message-from-creative-director
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: RollerCoaster Tycoon Classic now available for PS5, Xbox Series
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Xbox Series

Currently available for Switch, PC, iOS, and Android.

Remastered theme park management game RollerCoaster Tycoon Classic is now available for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series, publisher Atari and developer Graphite Lab announced.

RollerCoaster Tycoon Classic first launched for iOS and Android on December 21, 2016, followed y PC via Steam and GOG on September 28, 2017, and Switch on December 5, 2024.

Here is an overview of the game, via Atari:

About

RollerCoaster Tycoon Classic is a new RollerCoaster Tycoon experience, remastered in 2017 by franchise creator Chris Sawyer to combine the best features from two of the most successful and beloved RollerCoaster Tycoon games in the series’ history—-RollerCoaster Tycoon and RollerCoaster Tycoon 2. Roller Coaster Tycoon Classic also comes complete with the Toolkit, Wacky Worlds, and Time Twister expansion packs! Create and run amazing parks filled with the most outrageous rides imaginable. Roller Coaster Tycoon Classic includes a mixture of authentic playability, depth of gameplay and unique graphical style of Chris Sawyer’s original best-selling Roller Coaster Tycoon games. Packed with content, players can enjoy designing and building roller coasters and rides, landscaping parks and managing the staff and finances to keep their guests happy and the money flowing in. Can you become the next RollerCoaster Tycoon?

Key Features

  • The Original RollerCoaster Simulation – Experience all the fun from the original RollerCoaster Tycoon and RollerCoaster Tycoon 2 games, with a new sim that combines the best elements of both classic titles.
  • Coaster Construction – Create incredible roller coasters—quickly build a pre-made design or use the intuitive piece-by-piece building tools to design and theme your own unique rides.
  • Park Designer – Keep your guests happy by building gentle or wild rides, food and drink stalls, water rides, and even transport rides to take them around the park; Customize your park by building scenery, fine-tuning the landscape, and routing the footpaths.
  • Park Management – Run your park’s marketing and finances to make a profit while attracting more guests; Organize your staff to keep the park running well and looking its best.
  • Exciting Environments – Build the ultimate theme park in a variety of challenging environments, from the tranquility of Forest Frontiers to the bustling commerce of Megaworld Park.
  • Park Scenarios – Progress through 95 classic park scenarios from RollerCoaster Tycoon and RollerCoaster Tycoon 2.
  • Authentic Gameplay – Classic-style isometric graphics and original amusement park music and sound effects.
  • Packed with Content – Includes hundreds of types of roller coasters and rides, and dozens of different shops, stalls, and facilities.

Watch a new trailer below.

PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series Launch Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/rollercoaster-tycoon-classic-now-available-for-ps5-xbox-series
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Blue Reflection Quartet announced for PS5, Switch 2, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

Due out on July 30.

Publisher Koei Tecmo and developer Gust have announced Blue Reflection series collection Blue Reflection Quartet for PlayStation 5, Switch 2, Switch, and PC (Steam), including console remakes of the anime Blue Reflection: Ray and mobile game Blue Reflection: Sun. It will launch on July 30 worldwide.

In the west, Blue Reflection Quartet will be a digital-only release. In Japan, physical editions will be available for PlayStation 5 and Switch. The standard edition will cost 7,480 yen, the Premium Box will cost 11,330 yen, and the Special Collection Box will cost 24,200 yen. The Premium Box and Special Collections can also be purchased with a Steam download code. The Switch 2 version is digital-only. The Switch 2 and Switch versions are separate products, and save data cannot be transferred between them.

Here is an overview of the game, via Koei Tecmo:

About

The Blue Reflection series depicts the emotions and bonds of teenage girls across a variety of mediums, with character design and series supervision by famed illustrator Mel Kishida. Blue Reflection Quartet contains all four of these emotional stories in a single collection.

New features make the series more accessible than ever before, with a more detailed look at the setting that will help newcomers understand events and provide a deeper look for returning fans.

Blue Reflection

A console game which told the story of an injured former ballerina as she used her powers as a magical Reflector to form bonds with others and fight off the looming threat to the world. Textures have been updated to high resolution versions, and new visual effects such as glistening water add to the world’s atmosphere. New features such as autosave have been included, offering a more enjoyable experience than ever before.

Blue Reflection: Ray

An anime that tells the story of magical Reflectors clashing with each other over their conflicting beliefs and emotions.

This game tells a condensed version of the story, with the major characters rendered in 3D.

Follow Hiori and Ruka as they explore the Common while re-experiencing their memories on their way to confront a girl trying to recreate the world. New short stories expand on the anime’s story, and a new prologue and epilogue connect this entry to the other works in the series.

Blue Reflection: Sun

A mobile game that told the story of a team of girls living in a dying world as they hold on to hope for the future.

Sun‘s story has been remade as a console game using the systems of Blue Reflection: Second Light to recreate the memorable battles of the original game. 24 new character events have been added alongside the main story, and the prologue and epilogue from the original release connect this entry to the other works in the series.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Blue Reflection: Second Light

A console game that tells the story of a group of girls with no memories who find themselves in a strange world. Through their adventures, the girls must look deep inside their hearts, regain their memories, and discover the truth about the world they are living in.

This entry in the Blue Reflection project first came out in October of 2021. This release for Blue Reflection Quartet features eight additional characters from Ray and Sun who can join you in battle. These new characters also join Yuzuki and Lime as new additions to the Photo Mode! New features such as increased battle speed, faster movement speed while exploring, and event fast-forwarding have been included, offering a more enjoyable experience than ever before.

Reference

A database that gives deeper understanding of the world of the Blue Reflection series. Here you can check chronological flowcharts of major events in the stories, as well as character relationship charts across the entire series. This in-depth overview of the characters and the series’s setting will make the games even more enjoyable!

There is also a gallery where official artwork created by Mel Kishida can be viewed.

Watch the announcement trailer and an archive of today’s Blue Reflection 9th anniversary live stream below. View the first screenshots at the gallery. Visit the official website here: English / Japanese.

Announce Trailer

English

Japanese

Blue Reflection 9th Anniversary Live Stream



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/blue-reflection-quartet-announced-for-ps5-switch-2-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: PS5 and PlayStation Portal price increases announced
item.content:encoded:
• PS5

$100 increase for PS5, $150 increase for PS5 Pro, and $50 increase for PlayStation Portal.

Sony Interactive Entertainment has announced a pricing increase for PlayStation 5 consoles and PlayStation Portal remote player worldwide, effective April 2. The move is in response to “continued pressures in the global economic landscape.”

The updated manufacturer’s suggested retail prices are as follows:

  • United States
    • PlayStation 5 – $649.99 (previously $549.99)
    • PlayStation 5 Digital Edition – $599.99 (previously $499.99)
    • PlayStation 5 Pro – $899.99 (previously ($749.99)
    • PlayStation Portal – $249.99 (previously $199.99)
  • United Kingdom
    • PlayStation 5 – £569.99 (previously £479.99)
    • PlayStation 5 Digital Edition – £519.99 (previously £429.99)
    • PlayStation 5 Pro – £789.99 (previously £699.99)
    • PlayStation Portal – £219.99 (previously £199.99)
  • Europe
    • PlayStation 5 – €649.99 (previously €499.99)
    • PlayStation 5 Digital Edition – €599.99 (previously €499.99)
    • PlayStation 5 Pro – €899.99 (previously €799.99)
    • PlayStation Portal – €249.99 (previously €219.99)
  • Japan
    • PlayStation 5 – ¥97,980 (previously ¥79,980)
    • PlayStation 5 Digital Edition – ¥89,980 (previously ¥72,980)
    • PlayStation 5 Pro – ¥137,980 (previously ¥119,980)
    • PlayStation Portal – ¥39,980 (previously ¥34,980)


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/ps5-and-playstation-portal-price-increases-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Super Meat Boy 3D physical editions announced for PS5, Switch 2
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Switch 2

Due out on June 30.

Meridiem will release physical editions of Headup-published and Sluggerfly– and Team Meat-developed 3D platformer Super Meat Boy 3D for PlayStation 5 and Switch 2, the distributor announced. They will launch on June 30.

The physical release will be available in the following two editions:

  • Standard Edition
    • A copy of the game
    • Sticker set
    • Reversible Cover
  • Special Edition
    • A copy of the game
    • Sticker set
    • Reversible Cover
    • Special Sleeve
    • Lenticular Postcard
    • Cloth Patch
    • Art Book

Super Meat Boy 3D is due out for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC via Steam, Epic Games Store, and Microsoft Store on March 31.

Watch a new trailer below.

Physical Editions Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/super-meat-boy-3d-physical-editions-announced-for-ps5-switch-2
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok ‘Meet the Crew: Eustace’ trailer
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch 2

Another new playable character in action.

Publisher Cygames and developer Cygames Osaka have released the second “Meet the Crew” trailer for Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok, introducing new playable character Eustace (voiced by Kaiji Tang in English, Kazuya Nakai in Japanese).

Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok is due out for PlayStation 5, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, and PC via Steam on July 9.

Watch the trailer below.

Meet the Crew: Eustace

English

Japanese

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s3YGA07HhI



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/granblue-fantasy-relink-endless-ragnarok-meet-the-crew-eustace-trailer
